title: Measurement of heat production (thermogenesis) in cells using ERthermAC dye_microplate method
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"e533t","text":"lDifferentiate brown/white adipocytes in a black 96-well plate with clear bottom","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b0tkd","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2gq6n","text":"lPrepare staining medium: 250 nM ERthermAC dye in DMEM-H serum-free medium","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"5vi27","text":"lBioTracker ERthermAC Temperature-Sensitive Live Cell Dye (SCT057, Merck)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8e8ao","text":"(https://www.merckmillipore.com/TW/zh/product/BioTracker-ERthermAC-Temperature-Sensitive-Live-Cell-Dye,MM_NF-SCT057?ReferrerURL=https%3A%2F%2Fl.facebook.com%2F\u0026fbclid=IwAR1xNHOYdLL4iTg8IRPS0fHiwa88ZmXFFCu2vYnZTVg4ivkjz3_YKd1AFb8)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":1,"length":227}],"data":{}},{"key":"di3qj","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1745i","text":"lPrepare stock solution of ERthermAC dye (1 mM in DMSO)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9i046","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"pa71","text":"lBlack 96-well plate with clear bottom","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"","data":{"guid":"898E2D003DD111EB8B380A58A9FEAC2A","url":"https://www.merckmillipore.com/TW/zh/product/BioTracker-ERthermAC-Temperature-Sensitive-Live-Cell-Dye,MM_NF-SCT057?ReferrerURL=https%3A%2F%2Fl.facebook.com%2F\u0026fbclid=IwAR1xNHOYdLL4iTg8IRPS0fHiwa88ZmXFFCu2vYnZTVg4ivkjz3_YKd1AFb8"}}}}
steps: Wash differentiated adipocytes with PBS twice
Add 100 μL of staining solution per well of a 96-well plate
Add 90 ul of DMEM-H serum-free and phenol red-free medium each well
Equilibrate plate at 25 oC for 15 min
Measure 2-3 points of basal red fluorescence (ex/em, 543/590) in a microplate reader
Add 10 uL of medium or 10 mM CL-316,243 (CL)/forskolin (Fsk) each well (10x dilution, final 1 μM)
Measure the red fluorescence (ex/em, 543/590) every 5 min up to 1.5 ~ 2 hr
Calculate the decrease of fluorescence over time after drug treatment
creator: Chih-Hao Wang
